title: fraxinus ornus var. paniculata
intro: Fraxinus ornus var. paniculata, commonly known as the flowering ash, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the olive family (Oleaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant qualities. The health benefits of Fraxinus ornus var. paniculata include relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
